interaction with a smart contract, typical in blockchain development.\n\n---\n\n### Confirmations on Code Presence and Functionality:\n\n- The code matches the described purpose: deploying, attaching, connecting, and creating interfaces for the QuoterV2 contract.\n- Functions like `deploy()`, `attach()`, `connect()`, and `createInterface()` are standard.\n- The ABI includes functions for token swapping quotes, consistent with a DeFi quote provider.\n\n**Are the issues reported in the code?**  \n**Yes.** The code is present and aligns with the described functionality.\n\n---\n\n### Error,
